---
title: "FRAIMEL · Research & Theory"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header: assets/landing-head.html
    include-after-body: assets/landing-after-body.html
---

<style>
:root {
    --accent-primary: #4f46e5;
    --accent-secondary: #0f172a;
}

.fraimel-wrapper,
.fraimel-wrapper * {
    writing-mode: horizontal-tb !important;
    text-orientation: mixed !important;
}

.bg-grid-pattern {
    background-size: 40px 40px;
    background-image: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.05) 1px, transparent 1px),
                      linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.05) 1px, transparent 1px);
    mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, black 40%, transparent 100%);
    -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, black 40%, transparent 100%);
}

.math-display-box {
    background: #ffffff;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 2px 4px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
    border-left: 4px solid var(--accent-primary);
    font-family: "KaTeX_Main", "Times New Roman", serif;
}

.hover-underline-animation {
    display: inline-block;
    position: relative;
}
.hover-underline-animation::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    width: 100%;
    transform: scaleX(0);
    height: 1px;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    background-color: currentColor;
    transform-origin: bottom right;
    transition: transform 0.25s ease-out;
}
.hover-underline-animation:hover::after {
    transform: scaleX(1);
    transform-origin: bottom left;
}
</style>

<div class="fraimel-wrapper font-sans text-slate-600 antialiased">

<section class="relative min-h-[85vh] flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden bg-slate-50">
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-grid-pattern z-0 pointer-events-none"></div>
<div class="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full bg-gradient-to-b from-white/0 to-slate-50 z-0 pointer-events-none"></div>

<div class="relative z-10 max-w-5xl mx-auto px-6 text-center">

<div class="inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-8 shadow-sm">
<span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-indigo-500 mr-2 animate-pulse"></span>
FRAIMEL RESEARCH LOGS
</div>

<h1 class="text-5xl md:text-7xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-slate-900 mb-6 font-serif">
Math, ML Theory <br class="hidden md:block" />
& <span class="text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-600 to-teal-500">Executable Insights</span>
</h1>

<p class="mt-6 text-lg md:text-xl text-slate-600 max-w-2xl mx-auto leading-relaxed">
一位偏理论研究者的长期主义空间。<br/>
梳理概率、优化、RL 与 Diffusion 的核心脉络，致力于将<strong class="text-slate-900 font-semibold">「抽象的数学直觉」</strong>转化为<strong class="text-slate-900 font-semibold">「可复现的代码路径」</strong>。
</p>

<div class="mt-10 flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-center gap-4">
<a href="guides/index.html"
class="group inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-3.5 text-base font-semibold text-white bg-slate-900 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-800 transition-all duration-200 shadow-lg shadow-slate-900/20 ring-1 ring-slate-900">
<i data-lucide="compass" class="w-5 h-5 mr-2 text-indigo-300 group-hover:text-white transition-colors"></i>
Explore Guides
</a>
<a href="papers/index.html"
class="group inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-3.5 text-base font-medium text-slate-700 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-indigo-600 hover:border-indigo-200 transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm">
<i data-lucide="library" class="w-5 h-5 mr-2 text-slate-400 group-hover:text-indigo-500 transition-colors"></i>
Paper Notes
</a>
</div>

<div class="mt-12 flex justify-center items-center space-x-8 text-slate-400">
<a href="https://github.com/MIStatlE" class="hover:text-slate-900 transition-colors flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-medium hover-underline-animation">
<i data-lucide="github" class="w-4 h-4"></i> GitHub
</a>
<a href="posts/index.xml" class="hover:text-slate-900 transition-colors flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-medium hover-underline-animation">
<i data-lucide="rss" class="w-4 h-4"></i> RSS Feed
</a>
<a href="about.html" class="hover:text-slate-900 transition-colors flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-medium hover-underline-animation">
<i data-lucide="user" class="w-4 h-4"></i> About
</a>
</div>

</div>
</section>

<section class="py-20 bg-white">
<div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 sm:px-8">
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8">

<a href="guides/index.html" class="group block p-6 bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300">
<div class="w-12 h-12 bg-indigo-50 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center mb-4 group-hover:bg-indigo-600 transition-colors duration-300">
<i data-lucide="map" class="w-6 h-6 text-indigo-600 group-hover:text-white transition-colors"></i>
</div>
<h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-slate-900 mb-2 group-hover:text-indigo-600 transition-colors">Guides</h3>
<p class="text-sm text-slate-500 leading-relaxed">
体系化的知识地图。将概率、优化与 ML Theory 编织成可循的路径，比课本更贴近实战直觉。
</p>
</a>

<a href="papers/index.html" class="group block p-6 bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300">
<div class="w-12 h-12 bg-teal-50 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center mb-4 group-hover:bg-teal-600 transition-colors duration-300">
<i data-lucide="book-open-check" class="w-6 h-6 text-teal-600 group-hover:text-white transition-colors"></i>
</div>
<h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-slate-900 mb-2 group-hover:text-teal-600 transition-colors">Paper Picks</h3>
<p class="text-sm text-slate-500 leading-relaxed">
有选择地深度阅读。剖析核心贡献，厘清它在学术版图中的位置与价值。
</p>
</a>

<a href="posts/index.html" class="group block p-6 bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300">
<div class="w-12 h-12 bg-amber-50 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center mb-4 group-hover:bg-amber-500 transition-colors duration-300">
<i data-lucide="sparkles" class="w-6 h-6 text-amber-600 group-hover:text-white transition-colors"></i>
</div>
<h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-slate-900 mb-2 group-hover:text-amber-600 transition-colors">Thoughts</h3>
<p class="text-sm text-slate-500 leading-relaxed">
阶段性的思考碎片。关于科研路径、成长系统、以及人与 AI 共生的工作流。
</p>
</a>

<a href="tools/index.html" class="group block p-6 bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300">
<div class="w-12 h-12 bg-rose-50 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center mb-4 group-hover:bg-rose-500 transition-colors duration-300">
<i data-lucide="wrench" class="w-6 h-6 text-rose-600 group-hover:text-white transition-colors"></i>
</div>
<h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-slate-900 mb-2 group-hover:text-rose-600 transition-colors">Tools</h3>
<p class="text-sm text-slate-500 leading-relaxed">
可复制的科研 Setup。涵盖写作、实验管理与笔记系统的工程化实践。
</p>
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>

<section class="py-20 bg-slate-50 border-y border-slate-200">
<div class="max-w-6xl mx-auto px-6">
<div class="grid lg:grid-cols-2 gap-16 items-start">

<div>
<div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
<div class="p-2 bg-indigo-100 rounded-lg">
<i data-lucide="flask-conical" class="w-6 h-6 text-indigo-700"></i>
</div>
<h2 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-slate-900 font-serif">理论与直觉的切面</h2>
</div>

<p class="text-slate-600 text-lg mb-6 leading-relaxed">
FRAIMEL 的核心理念在于<strong>祛魅</strong>。我们从具体的数学定义出发，但不止步于公式。
</p>
<p class="text-slate-600 mb-8">
无论是 VAE 的 ELBO 推导，还是 PAC Learning 的泛化界，我们都尝试构建一座桥梁：一端是严谨的推导，另一端是 PyTorch 的几行核心代码。
</p>

<div class="space-y-4">
<div class="p-4 bg白 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:border-indigo-300 transition-colors cursor-default">
<div class="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
<span class="text-xs font-bold tracking-wide text-indigo-600 uppercase">Generalization</span>
</div>
<h4 class="font-bold text-slate-900">从 Hoeffding 到 PAC</h4>
<p class="text-sm text-slate-500 mt-1">理解 Learning Bound 如何在证明中“限制”模型空间，而非仅仅记忆不等式。</p>
</div>

<div class="p-4 bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:border-teal-300 transition-colors cursor-default">
<div class="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
<span class="text-xs font-bold tracking-wide text-teal-600 uppercase">Reinforcement Learning</span>
</div>
<h4 class="font-bold text-slate-900">Bandits 与乐观原理</h4>
<p class="text-sm text-slate-500 mt-1">把 Regret Bound 当作叙事来读：不确定性（Uncertainty）是如何被量化并利用的。</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="relative mt-4 lg:mt-0">
<div class="absolute -inset-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-500 to-teal-400 rounded-2xl blur opacity-20"></div>

<div class="relative bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden border border-slate-200">
<div class="bg-slate-50 border-b border-slate-200 px-4 py-3 flex items-center justify-between">
<div class="flex gap-1.5">
<div class="w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-red-400"></div>
<div class="w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-amber-400"></div>
<div class="w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-green-400"></div>
</div>
<span class="text-xs text-slate-400 font-mono">theory_snippet.tex</span>
</div>

<div class="p-8">
<h3 class="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-800 mb-4 flex items-center">
Example: VAE Evidence Lower Bound
</h3>

<div class="math-display-box p-6 rounded-lg bg-slate-50/50 mb-6 overflow-x-auto">
$$
\mathcal{L}(\theta, \phi; x)
= \mathbb{E}_{q_{\phi}(z|x)}[\log p_{\theta}(x|z)]
- D_{\mathrm{KL}}\bigl(q_{\phi}(z|x)\parallel p(z)\bigr)
$$
</div>

<p class="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-2 font-medium">Intuition:</p>
<ul class="text-sm text-slate-500 space-y-2 list-disc list-inside">
<li><span class="text-indigo-600 font-mono text-xs bg-indigo-50 px-1 py-0.5 rounded">Reconstruction</span>: 生成模型能否重现数据？</li>
<li><span class="text-rose-600 font-mono text-xs bg-rose-50 px-1 py-0.5 rounded">Regularization</span>: 编码分布是否偏离先验太远？</li>
</ul>

<div class="mt-6 pt-4 border-t border-slate-100 flex justify-between items-center">
<span class="text-xs text-slate-400">Implementation: Reparameterization Trick</span>
<i data-lucide="code-2" class="w-4 h-4 text-slate-300"></i>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</section>

<section class="py-24 bg-white">
<div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6">

<div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-12">

<div class="w-48 h-48 shrink-0 relative group">
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-indigo-600 rounded-full blur opacity-20 group-hover:opacity-40 transition-opacity duration-500"></div>
<img src="https://placehold.co/400x400/f1f5f9/475569?text=LIAM"
alt="Researcher Portrait"
class="relative w-full h-full object-cover rounded-full border-4 border-white shadow-xl grayscale hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-500">
</div>

<div class="text-center md:text-left">
<h2 class="text-3xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-4 font-serif">About FRAIMEL</h2>
<p class="text-slate-600 leading-relaxed mb-6">
由 <span class="font-semibold text-slate-900">Liam Chen</span> 维护。
作为一名偏理论路线的研究者，我关注 <span class="text-indigo-600 font-medium">Probabilistic ML, Optimization, & Diffusion Models</span>。
</p>
<p class="text-slate-600 leading-relaxed mb-8">
这里记录了一个理想主义者如何在现实世界中持续成长：减少信息噪音，打通数学与代码的壁垒，并为后来者提供一份可供参考的“样本”。
</p>

<a href="mailto:liam.chen.research@example.com"
class="inline-flex items-center text-indigo-600 font-semibold hover:text-indigo-800 transition-colors group">
Get in touch via Email
<i data-lucide="arrow-right" class="ml-2 w-4 h-4 group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform"></i>
</a>
</div>

</div>

</div>
</section>

<footer class="py-12 bg-slate-50 border-t border-slate-200 text-center">
<p class="text-slate-400 text-sm mb-2">© 2025 FRAIMEL Research. Built with Quarto &amp; Logic.</p>
<p class="text-slate-300 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">Long-termism in a Fast World</p>
</footer>

</div>
